title: ClovSkins
description: A mod that allows you to change the skin in the game itself
body:
# ClovSkins A mod that allows you to change your skin within the game!
You can use any method of loading the skin: - File - URL - Nickname ## Buttons in the menus ![https://wfu.kelcu.ru/CCkOaED](https://wfu.kelcu.ru/CCkOaED) ![https://wfu.kelcu.ru/E4lUatk](https://wfu.kelcu.ru/E4lUatk) ## Main menu ![https://wfu.kelcu.ru/k8Tjct1](https://wfu.kelcu.ru/k8Tjct1) ## Selecting a skin ![https://wfu.kelcu.ru/3lDNelf](https://wfu.kelcu.ru/3lDNelf) ## Edit skin ![https://wfu.kelcu.ru/8lXIQjz](https://wfu.kelcu.ru/8lXIQjz) ## New character editing window ![https://wfu.kelcu.ru/f9hKcuc](https://wfu.kelcu.ru/f9hKcuc)
